entry.title: Crystal Reports Error Vendor Code 916
entry.content:
In SAP Business One, we are using the Payment Engine to do EFT/ACH.  In one company it works fine and I have a Crystal Report that the Electronic File Manager uses to create the payment file.  In another company/DB, I needed to add a table to the crystal report.  The Crystal Report Preview works fine, the EFM preview works fine.  As soon as I implement this EFM into the file format under Payment Means, and run a Payment Wizard to generate a payment file, I get an error saying Vendor Code 916.  Does anyone know what the fix for this should be?

Thanks in advance.

entry.title: Re: Curricula Completion
entry.content: The item-curricula relationship needs to exist in Learning, so that item completion could be considered for the curricula completion. In the curricula, the "Ignore Previous Completions Older Than" setting can be reviewed as well.

entry.title: Re: Massachusetts - Supplemental vs Base Wages
entry.content: Hello all - Is anyone having an issue with Massachusetts and negative supplemental payments being paid at the same time as regular payments beginning in your 2025 payrolls and this reverse engine process? We have a few employees that we cannot pay correctly because MA supplemental is calculating some astronomical tax amount on a negative supplemental payment passing with a positive supplemental ($205,000 tax on $44.49 wages). The /S01 is negative in our first payroll of 2025 due to a refund of a supplemental payment made in 2024 that is now being reversed in 2025 (happens on a regular basis-nothing new for us). We had a lot of issues with MA and supplemental payments when they changed their tax calculation last July, but finally got that resolved (or so we think). The issue here is that since the /S01 is a negative YTD for period 1.2025, the BSI interface is not creating the "AT ETC: 3" output for the reverse engine process that it should. It is still creating it as "AT ETC: 0" and this is creating the astronomical tax amount that will never be taken because it is so high. It also prevents any pre-tax deductions from being withheld from the employee since taxes are to be withheld first and then other items come second. This is not an issue for any other state with the same exact setup (GA, VA, NC, DC, etc). These other states are creating the "AT ETC: 3" in the BSI interface even though they also have a negative YTD /S01 to process. So why is MA different than these other states? We have a ticket raised with both BSI and SAP and have applied all notes that have been mentioned, but we are still unable to get this to work properly. I would very much appreciate anyone's input if you have seen this issue in your system. Thanks, Alicia

entry.title: Is it possible to create an Application in a 2-SL using Custom CDS View without BTP?
entry.content:
Dear SAP,

 

We have created a Custom CDS view using Custom CDS view app. We want to deploy it as a app but we do not have BTP. Is there a way to deploy it as a app in SAP Public Cloud ?


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: Is it possible to create an Application in a 2-SL usi...
entry.content:
Dear Customer,

 

In this case the only option would be to create a Custom Analytical Query using this Custom CDS View and then create an application using the Custom Analytical Query. However, this would only work if you have an Analytical Scenario for your Custom CDS View.

If this would fit your requirement, you can check the following blog posts:

  • Create an app for the CDS View or Analytical query
  • Creating Custom CDS Views and Analytical Query - A step by step guide

Kind regards.

entry.title: Re: For an in-depth look at clean core and how to implement it, read our Clean Core Extensibility pa
entry.content: Great blog Steffen!  The Hitachi success story is powerful.

entry.title: SAPinsider Las Vegas
entry.content:
Join us at SAPinsider Las Vegas for two sessions that will revolutionize your approach to tax compliance!

In an ever-evolving regulatory landscape, staying ahead of compliance challenges is more crucial than ever. These sessions will dive into the latest innovations from SAP designed to simplify and streamline your tax compliance processes. Learn how AI can automate routine tasks, improve accuracy, and provide real-time insights.

Tuesday, March 18, 10:40 AM
Session: What's New from SAP: Re-think How You Run Tax Compliance and Comply with the Tsunami of New Regulations Emerging Everywhere

Wednesday, March 19, 11:40 AM
Session: Transform and Automate Tax Compliance with AI

Get updates about SAPinsider Las Vegas here

Register now to secure your spot!

hard to tell, without any further inputs, what filters do you use etc.

entry.content:
I have not seen that error before.  What MDK version / platform are you using?

What is the flow like when it occurs?  Could it be a timing issue where a page is being closed but there is an action that is trying to reference something on the page that was just closed?

entry.title: Re: Problems while upload many items from offline store
entry.content: What version of MDK are you using?

entry.title: SAP S/4HANA_Open Sales Order migration_Migration Cockpit error
entry.content:
Hello Experts,

while migrating open sales in Migration Cockpit through Staging File approach, we couldn't be successful and we are getting below error message in Simulate Step. 

Due to the above error message, we couldn't migrate open sales orders.

we are attempting to check only 1 open sales order however migration is not successful ending up with errors in Simulate Step.

Could you please advise on this and would really appreciate your expert advise on how to fix this error. 

Thank you

kind regards

Thangaraj Thomas

entry.title: Re: Problems while upload many items with upload categories
entry.content: Can you send me a full export of your MDK app metadata from BAS (you can send privately) so I can review and try to reproduce? Thanks

entry.title: Re: SRDEBUG IN S/4 HANA 1909
entry.content:
Hi,

 

SRDEBUG has been deprecated, see SAP NOTE 1766428 - Remote ABAP debugging: changed behavior 

You can achieve this simply by adding user breakpoints directly in the ABAP code, and it's valid for all application servers.

 

Best,

Edrilan Berisha

entry.title: Why choose SAP Business Network Global Track and Trace – Insight to Action (4 of 7)
entry.content:
Throughout this series, based on "Why choose SAP Business Network Global Track and Trace over individual visibility platforms," we've seen how SAP's solution consolidates connections, synchronizes data, and analyzes impacts. Here, we examine a fourth aspect that sets SAP Business Network Global Track and Trace apart: "Achieve Insight to Action," which empowers manufacturers and distributors to translate data into meaningful decisions

"Insight to action" means transforming data-driven business insights into real decisions, efficient actions, and measurable outcomes. The principle of insight to action emphasizes not just understanding information but using it to drive business value.

Reason #4: Insight to Action

"Insight to action" is the capability to turn data-driven insights into decisions and actions that drive business outcomes. It emphasizes the importance of not just gathering and analyzing information but then using that information to make informed decisions and take efficient actions.

The three elements of insight to action are:

  • Data-driven decision-making – Using analytics and insights to inform strategic choices.
  • Automation and efficiency – Leveraging AI or automation to act on insights in real-time.
  • Business impact – Ensuring that insights lead to measurable improvements, such as cost savings, on-time delivery, risk avoidance, or enhanced customer experiences.

Global manufacturing and distribution operations routinely face this challenge:

You have access to vast amounts of information, but struggle to find the details, connections, and patterns to turn information into actionable decisions that actually help your performance.

This can lead to delays in decision-making, missed opportunities, and a reactive approach to problem-solving that can jeopardize production or disappoint customers.

SAP Business Network Global Track and Trace enables you to overcome this challenge in your logistics and fulfillment operations.  SAP’s solution enables insight to action by providing a single platform connecting the dots between material and product movements and order fulfillment, making information readily accessible in the business context of you core ERP processes. This includes:

  • Real-time tracking updates – Manufacturers and distributors can track the location of their shipments in real-time, eliminating the need to leave their core processes to access multiple sources, then return to put the tracking in the context of order fulfillment.
  • Integration with business documents – Tracking data is linked to relevant documents, such as purchase, sales, or stock transfer order, providing the business context for decision-making to monitor on-time in-full fulfillment performance.
  • Hooks to core processes – The platform enables native integrations into core process, such as planning as well as inbound and outbound deliveries, to provide reliable estimated times of arrival that can drive inventory management, sales lead times, production schedules and customer expectations.  

 For example, consider a manufacturer facing an import delay for a critical delivery. With SAP's solution, they can tracking the shipment relative to its purchase or stock transfer order, and integrate the order ETA into inventory and production planning. This integrated approach eliminates the need to switch between systems or contact multiple internal or external partners, enabling swift and decisive insight to action to delivery on-time and in-full for your customer.

SAP’s insight to action capability empowers global manufacturers to move beyond data overload and harness the power of their information. By providing a platform for informed and timely decision-making along inbound or outbound fulfillment processes, SAP Business Network Global Track and Trace enables manufacturers to optimize their logistics performance, improve responsiveness, and gain a competitive edge.

Insight to action turns your supply chain performance into competitive advantage. 

Stay tuned for reason #5, where we'll explore how SAP’s solution integrates with existing systems for seamless data flow. Check back here for the upcoming link or subscribe to SAP Business Network for Logistics on SAP Community.

entry.title: Re: Transportation Charge Calculation - Absolute & Relati...
entry.content: You can do this without any custom enhancement. Rate Table determintion based on Customer will cover the requirement.

entry.title: Re: 1 or 2 S/4HANA instance architecture?
entry.content:
Hello @Austin1000x,

the discussion depends on what you are doing today with the legacy ECC, which license mode, what you want to keep as legacy data, .... So I have listed some questions which could help you to define the best scenario: 

  • Is your current S/4HANA integrated with the ECC for doing the financial posting (aggregated postings from FICA)? If no, does this mean that S/4HANA has its own Finance processes in place?
  • Is there a need to integrate more than 1 customer billing system towards the S/4HANA Finance system?
  • Are you considering Rise for SAP or are you already on Rise for SAP?
  • Do you have a 3-tier, 4-tier, ... landscape?
  • Is there a need to simplify the Finance set-up (e.g. consolidation of company codes)?
  • Do you want to migrate historical data from the ECC instance? If yes, all data or only selective data?

Of course I am happy to share my opinion about this topic, when I get some answers / extra info about the current instances.

Cheers,

Pieter

entry.title: GRPO / Stock Transfers FX Rate Differences
entry.content:
We record GRPO's into Warehouse 02 as Goods in Transit. When the Goods arrive at our Warehouse we do a stock transfer from 02 to 01. We have separate GL accounts for Stock and Stock in Transit.

However if we record the GRPO in a different month to the Stock Transfer at a different exchange rate to the Stock Transfer then the difference will be stuck in Stock in Transit forever?

Please help.

entry.title: Re: SAP SQL Anywhere RESTORE with RENAME - What is the correct script for restoring database
entry.content: Redacting and/or changing the context of your responses make it very difficult to help. I would suggest opening a support incident if you are concerned with sharing the exact details of what you are doing. As noted, very few environments use "backup to archive" so you will find limited expertise/experience on this forum for this backup type. The 'a_restore' is the database name used by the engine during a "recovery" of an archive backup. Are the rename restored dbspaces on the same disk? If so, which file is being reported in the direct I/O message?

entry.title: ⚡ Vamos realizar 1º SAP Meet-Up do ano de 2025!
entry.content:
O objetivo do evento é reunir profissionais SAP proporcionando uma excelente oportunidade para se conectar, compartilhar experiências e discutir as ações da comunidade SAP Fortaleza para o nosso principal evento o SAP Inside Track Fortaleza -2025.

Contamos com você pra que este evento seja um verdadeiro sucesso !

Endereço: R. Sen. Pompeu, 2610 - Benfica, Fortaleza - Condomínio Praça da Luz - Salão de Festa

entry.title: Re: CAP Java: How to connect to PostgreSQL on BTP from BAS
entry.content: @Dinu Thank you very much for your prompt reply. I was able to connect to the PostgreSQL instance from BAS using the method you suggested.

entry.title: Re: Inconsistent temporary document number assignment
entry.content: Check the configuration of the document types in Invoice Verification under T-Code OMR4. Ensure that in MIRO - MR8M, the document type for revaluation is properly assigned to a document type. Misconfiguration in this setting can lead to inconsistencies in temporary document number assignments.

entry.title: Missing connection of material 9387 in plant PLZ7 to the material ledger
entry.content: I'm encountering a problem with the EWM (Extended Warehouse Management) queue that's preventing stock updates from being sent to S4HANA. While I can successfully perform Goods Receipts (GR) in EWM and see the stock reflected in the EWM destination bin, these stock changes are not being communicated to S4HANA. This blockage in the queue is halting further processing and preventing inventory synchronization between the two systems. Essentially, the stock appears to be stuck in EWM and not updating in S4HANA.

entry.title: Re: ⚡ Vamos realizar 1º SAP Meet-Up do ano de 2025!
entry.content: Recomeço...vamos preparar o melhor evento SAP Inside Track do Brazil!

entry.title: Re: Transportation Charge Calculation - Absolute & Relati...
entry.content:
Hello Rene,

Thank you for your answer and concern.

I understand your proposal but as you know dealing with a rate table determination rule would lead to multiple rate tables (which has been rejected by the customer). Said differently from the initial question, we didn't want to have the calculation type determine on a interval of a scale but we wanted to have the calculation type based on the rate itself, on each combination of scales on the rate table.

Anyway, it has been solved in 10 lines of code.

Best regards,

entry.title: Spanish User Group Meeting - Human Capital Management Madrid
entry.content:
Changes in regulations have a substantial effect on industries and businesses, determining aspects such as operational costs, market competitiveness, and consumer trust.

Learn about the latest regulatory changes and enhancements from Gema Moraleda, the Local Product Manager at SAP for Human Experience Management. Sothis, an SAP partner will share about the latest news in Artificial Intelligence for SAP SuccessFactors.

Check out the agenda and find out about more exciting sessions on the usage of Artificial Intelligence in SAP SuccessFactors.

This event is targeted at members of AUSAPE. The webinar will be conducted in Spanish.

Registration link

entry.title: Re: Creating Tax Groups for Taxes Exception
entry.content:
Currently I am implementing Brazil.

The consultants haven not been able (maybe on purpose) to explain how the system works for Tax groups overall AND how they are used, so when I found your Blog I was amazed.

I can understood 

  1. How are set up
  2. How they are used

I was able to understand why the documentation always talks about creation , modification and deletion of records.

With this now is clear.

I just want you to thank you!

entry.title: Re: SAP Customer Data Cloud Screen-sets handling custom l...
entry.content: I don't recommend using search during end user flow as it's not intended for that. search api can be heavy and not optimized for such use case. I understand what you are trying to achieve, but if you need the email to be unique the proper way is to define it as login identifier. I'll update my answer

entry.title: Re: SAP BTP Integration Suite - New Message Metrics
entry.content: @MartyMcCormick I have a question regarding the splitter. When you, for example, receive a bulk request for business partners and you want to send them to Kafka as single entry and enabled Batch Size still count it as a single message? For example, let's assume the bulk request has a size of 1 MB. Each single message has 50 KB. If the batch size is set to 250 KB, will it be counted as 4 or 20 messages?

entry.title: IW41 Confirmation - The reason field can't be set Mandatory via SPRO
entry.content:
Hi All, I am working on making the reason field mandatory for a specific sub-operation based on the Command Key. 

I set all needed config but the field is still optionnal when submitting confirmation. 

Thank you for your help!

entry.title: Re: SAPUI5 Tools for Eclipse – Now is the Time to Look for Alternatives
entry.content:
Hi, I also have issues with the UI Development Kit for HTML5 in Eclipse 2019-12. I tried to install the plugin (https://tools.hana.ondemand.com/2019-12) for the supported Eclipse version but I get the following error:

Not only am I not able to create a SAPUI5 project, the Java EE perspective is defective after the plugin is installed.

I was aware there won't be any bug fixes or maintenance for the SAPUI5 Toolkit in Eclipse, but I was expecting it to work at least. It was working last I checked in June 2024. Does anyone have a solution for this? 

Thanks in advance! 

PS: I'm not very hopeful there's a solution.

entry.title: Re: Group Reporting (1SG) - Is it possible to bypass it b...
entry.content:
Hello,

Thank you for your question.

Can you please read the following information:

Chart of Accounts: Different Type

Consolidation

Kind regards,

Henrike

entry.title: Re: Best way of regular data download from S4HC to MS SQL...
entry.content:
Hi Attila,

The recommended way of data extraction is via Extract CDS Views.

How to discover view for extraction:

https://blogs.sap.com/2019/06/06/discover-cds-view-based-extractors-from-sap-s4hana-cloud/

https://blogs.sap.com/2022/01/07/finding-the-right-cds-extractor-in-sap-s-4hana/

 

2884410 - CDS based data extraction: Delta capability

 

In the View Browser, you would want to look for views with the #DataExtraction attribute. Ideally you want the ones that support Change Data Capture (CDC).

Here a couple of blogs:

https://blogs.sap.com/2017/10/09/abap-core-data-services-part-2virtual-data-model-types/

 

Which is part of the series:

https://blogs.sap.com/2017/09/09/abap-core-data-services-introduction-abap-cds-view/

 

I also found this blog very informative:

https://blogs.sap.com/2018/03/19/s4-embedded-analytics-the-virtual-data-model/

 

There are several supporting Best Practices:
Core Data Services-Based Extraction with SAP S/4HANA Cloud (35D)

ABAP Core Data Services Extraction for SAP HANA (6N4)

ABAP Core Data Services Extraction for SAP Datasphere (53L)

ABAP Core Data Services Extraction for SAP Data Intelligence (53M)

 

Usually that means you are going with an OnPrem BW from SAP or Datasphere, etc.

Or you need a middleware that supports CDC (Azure might have a connector to do this )

 

Please let us know if this helps

Thank you
Jerry

entry.title: Update directory structure in subaccount
entry.content:
Hi Team,

I'm trying to change subaccount display name and directory structure like change the parent of a directory and move subaccount from one directory to another. If I change these features, will it cause changes (update/delete) my existing services or developments that are already created in my subaccount. Please advise.


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: Update directory structure in subaccount
entry.content:
Hello,

The Display Name can be changed without impact to services and developments, it's used only for identification:

https://help.sap.com/docs/btp/sap-business-technology-platform/change-subaccount-details

Regarding directory adjustments, the services and developments themselves in the subaccount are not changed, but note this part in the documentation regarding entitlements:

https://help.sap.com/docs/btp/sap-business-technology-platform/manage-account-explorer-hierarchy

Best regards,
SAP Support

"A subaccount moves with its assigned service plans and quota. The entitlements of the source and target directories are adjusted accordingly.

If any entitlement for a plan in the target directory is configured with the auto-assign option, it is then automatically applied to the moved subaccount. Automatic quota assignments are subject to available quota in the target directory."

entry.title: Re: Disable Authentication pop up and CSRF token for ODat...
entry.content:
why?

this is the worst thing you can do

entry.title: Variable Pay - Custom gates with cross section impact
entry.content:
In this recording we show how to build the following requirements in Variable Pay:

  • If one specific business goal OR if at least one business goal doesn't meet a custom gate defined by the customer for the goal then prevent the employee from getting a payout on the individual performance for that record.

 

https://youtu.be/ZiOeUeRyXb4

 

Takeaways from the recording: 

  • Use numbers to build rollups and not text
  • Build the fields used in the rollup logic in their respective sections first, then save and log out log back in before connecting them using the Aggregate Field feature (if you don't do that you will run into error messages).
  • Remember that Assignment Level is the spine of the variable pay body, everything must go through it for bottom to top customized designs to work (from top to bottom it's actually not needed, one can simply paste the ID of an entry level column into the assignment sections - indDetail, indSection, etc.. - and it will work fine)
  • As of 2H 2024 such a design isn't possible when several business goal sections are in use (custom fields are not supported in case of multiple business goal sections).
  • If you need to load a different gate for each business goal you can use a lookup table like this : 

 

 

 

All the best,

Xavier 

If you found this blog useful please consider giving it a kudo !

entry.title: Re: Exposing JWKS from SAP Cloud Integration
entry.content: Why isn't the encrypted communication chanel enough here?

entry.title: OData V2 - An existing connection was forcibly closed by the remote host
entry.content:
Hello everyone,

We are calling CDS views through OData V2 gateways. This works fine, but sometimes we get this error message: An existing connection has been forcibly closed by the remote host.

We may be sending too many requests to our SAP application servers.

We want to know:

* why we're receiving this random error.
* where we can monitor these errors in SAP, not just on the client side to find the root cause.
* what kind of resources we should increase (memory, CPU, others)

Thanks for your help.

entry.title: Tag Screen Persona changes to a particular screen
entry.content:
Hello Team,

We are enhancing our RF Screens via Screen Personas and facing below issues. Any pointers/leads is much appreciated.

  1. Let's say I insert a label on one screen, it gets reflected on all the subsequent screens. How do I restrict the changes on this screen to be reflected only on this screen and does not reflect on other screens.
  2. As we are changing the look and feel of the RF screens, we are changing the size of the RF screen buttons. As we do not have a word wrap feature, we are not able to get the full text of the button on the screen. Agreed, we have tool tips, but we wanted to see if we can somehow get the entire text on the same button.
  3. Let's say I have 10 buttons, and first 6 are visible on the screen and for the next 4 I press down arrow. Now, the changes I make on button 7, like adding an icon or changing the size of the button, gets reflected on the button 1 as the position of button 7 and 1 are same. Please see images below.

Below if you see, the Icon I added on button 7 is now reflected on button 1. Whereas, I had a different Icon on button 1 initially.

Below, if I change the size of button 7, it is the size is now reflected back on button 1.

Any leads on resolving these issues is highly appreciated. Thank you.

entry.content:
hello,

 

Is there any possibility to check if ASKB was run in real mode if nothing was posted? How i can check if each month ASKB was run if no postings were created?

Many thanks,

Denisa

entry.title: Re: Vendor Consignment stock in transit
entry.content: Here is another possibility --You can do 103 against the consignment PO which is GR Block Stock --once you are ready to receive then post 105 against the consignment PO--after that, you post can do 411+K.

entry.title: Queries about the Digital Discovery Assessment (DDA) in SAP S/4HANA Cloud
entry.content:
Dear SAP,

We're currently working on a project using the SAP Activate methodology in an SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition, and while we're aware of the Digital Discovery Assessment (DDA) tool, we'd like more information about it! For instance:

  • How can we access it or verify that the DDA tool is enabled for usage?

Thanks in advance!

Best regards,
Implementation consultants


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: Queries about the Digital Discovery Assessment (DDA)...
entry.content:
Dear consultants,

We have a centralized KBA to solve all your doubts about the Digital Discovery Assessment (DDA) tool, including the queries you've made:

  • 3426181 - Information about DDA (Digital Discovery Assessment) tool

Should you have any further questions about the tool, please, send them to the e-mail provided in the KBA:

  • (...) for any additional queries, please reach out to: digitaldiscovery@sap.com

Best regards,
SAP Support

entry.title: Cline for SAP AI Core: Bringing Cline's Power to the SAP Ecosystem
entry.content:
Introduction

In the ever-evolving landscape of AI-assisted development, integrating advanced AI capabilities directly into your workflow can significantly enhance productivity and innovation. I'm excited to introduce Cline for SAP AI Core, a new Visual Studio Code (VS Code) extension that brings the power of SAP AI Core into the agentic coding experience of Cline. This extension enables SAP developers to seamlessly interact with state-of-the-art AI models through their SAP Business Technology Platform (BTP) accounts, unlocking new levels of efficiency in coding and business application development.

Why Cline for SAP AI Core?

The original Cline extension has been transformative for developers, offering an AI partner that plans before coding, ensuring thoughtful and efficient code generation. However, it doesn't integrate external AI providers outside its direct control. Recognizing the need for SAP AI Core support within the SAP development ecosystem, I created this dedicated extension to bridge the gap.

With Cline for SAP AI Core, developers working with SAP BTP can now access advanced AI models natively within their VS Code environment, ensuring a seamless and efficient workflow tailored for enterprise use.

Key Features

  • Seamless Integration with SAP AI Core: Directly connect to AI Core services within VS Code, allowing for a unified development environment.

  • Access to Advanced AI Models: Utilize models such as Claude 3.5 Sonnet, Claude 3 Sonnet, Claude 3 Haiku, Claude 3 Opus, GPT-4o, GPT-4o Mini, and GPT-4, empowering developers with capabilities like code completion, debugging assistance, and natural language understanding.

  • Tailored for SAP BTP Users: Leverage your SAP AI Core infrastructure within Cline for AI-driven development and automation, enhancing productivity and innovation.

How to Get Started

Installation:

  • Open VS Code.

  • Navigate to the Extensions tab (Windows: Ctrl+Shift+X- Mac: Cmd+Shift+X).

  • Search for "Cline for SAP AI Core".

  • Click "Install" and restart VS Code if needed.

Configuration:

  • Open Settings in Cline for SAP AI Core.

  • Select SAP AI Core as your API provider.

  • Enter the required authentication details:

    • AI Core Client ID

    • AI Core Client Secret

    • AI Core Base URL (e.g., https://api.ai.internalprod.eu-central-1.aws.ml.hana.ondemand.com/v2)

    • AI Core Auth URL (e.g., https://aicoreexample.authentication.sap.hana.ondemand.com/oauth/token)

    • AI Core Resource Group

  • Select your preferred AI Model from the list of available models.

Unlocking New Possibilities

By integrating Cline with SAP AI Core, developers can:

  • Enhance Code Quality: Leverage AI to generate well-structured code, reducing errors and improving maintainability.

  • Automate Repetitive Tasks: Utilize AI to handle routine coding tasks, allowing developers to focus on more complex aspects of development.

  • Accelerate Development Cycles: With AI assistance, rapidly prototype and develop applications, shortening time-to-market.

For a comprehensive tutorial on how Cline can transform your coding workflow, you might find the following video helpful:

Cline + VS Code Changed How I Code Forever

Additionally, to learn more about how to use Cline in your SAP development workflow, check out this resource:

Unlocking the Power of AI-Assisted ABAP Coding with VS Code and Cline

Join the Future of AI-Assisted Development

Cline for SAP AI Core opens up new possibilities for AI-driven coding and automation within the SAP ecosystem. By seamlessly integrating SAP AI Core into VS Code, developers are empowered with cutting-edge AI models to enhance productivity and innovation.

Give it a try today and experience the future of AI-assisted SAP development!

I would love to hear your feedback and experiences! Let’s discuss in the comments below. 🚀

entry.title: Meet the SAP BTP Services for Spend: SAP Build
entry.content:
Welcome to 2025! Near the end of last year, I got to speak about SAP Business Technology Platform (BTP) at Spend Connect Live and Virtual and was able to hear from customers firsthand. There were a lot of questions surrounding how SAP BTP can be used for Spend, so this year I am kicking off a blog series highlighting different services offered within SAP Business Technology Platform and how it can be utilized through use cases. In this blog, discover how you can make your procurement experience with Ariba more efficient using Build Process Automation, Build Work Zone, Build Work Zone Advanced Edition, and SAP Build Code. 

The Services 

Before we look at the highlighted use cases, let us introduce the services: 

  • SAP Build Process Automation handles the entire purchasing process by automating approvals, keeping stakeholders connected, and working with different procurement tools 
  • SAP Build Work Zone provides a unified and user-friendly platform where stakeholders can request, approve, and collaborate on procurement processes, enhancing visibility and user experience. For full customization and a tailored dashboard, SAP Build Work Zone, Advanced Edition is needed.  
  • SAP Build Code facilitates the creation of custom logic, extensions, and backend processes to support intelligent intake forms, data processing, and integration with procurement solutions, ensuring the application meets specific business needs and scales efficiently. 

The Use Cases 

Automate procurement ordering processes 

Manual ordering processes often involve several time-consuming and error-prone processes. Using SAP Build Process Automation and SAP Build Code, you can automate the approval of purchase requisitions, build real-time visibility dashboards for procurement operations, and automate the maintenance of purchase information records within SAP Ariba. 

See how Blue Diamond Growers were able to reduce tedious work, increase accuracy, and speed up processing here. 

Personalized Digital Workplaces for Procurement Pros 

A spend system can consist of several products, making accessing information difficult. Using SAP Build Work Zone, advanced edition and SAP Build Code, you can create a centralized location for easier role-based access to information. Gathering data from SAP Analytics Cloud, you can integrate with different procurement backend systems such as SAP Ariba and SAP S/4HANA and access all the required information from any device.

See our demo video and how PILLER Blowers & Compressors implemented this use case for their workplace here. 

With these two use cases, you can elevate your spend processes to allow you to make better decisions and increase efficiency. To learn more, visit sap.com/btp-for-spend, and look out for the next blog!

entry.title: Re: Self-scheduling on the go: Digitalizing staffing at dm-drogerie markt with projekt0708
Maximizing the Value of AI for HR
entry.content:
Organizations today recognize the potential of AI to improve their business processes and workforce outcomes, but they can only realize AI’s promised value if their workforce understands and effectively adopts new AI tools. To understand the current state of AI at work – and in particular, HR – the SAP SuccessFactors HR research team hosted interviews with 79 HR and IT professionals from 59 SAP SuccessFactors customer organizations and conducted a global survey of 4,023 individual contributors and people managers across regions and industries. We have taken insights from the research and highlighted strategic and technological recommendations for organizations to capitalize on the potential of AI. 

The first report, "HR’s guide to enterprise AI adoption: Strategies for AI governance and workforce engagement," discusses the barriers that organizations face to greater adoption of AI tools, one of them being the fact that 78% of organizations do not have a specific budget for AI investments. We provide recommendations for how to overcome those barriers by developing a comprehensive AI governance model and implementing employee-centered adoption interventions. 

The second report, "HR’s guide to improving AI literacy and AI readiness across the business," centers around the importance of improving AI literacy across the workforce in order to realize business outcomes from AI. In fact, our research shows that people with low AI literacy are between 4.3 and 11.8 times less likely to have used AI at work. This report also discusses the unique needs of employees, managers, and HR professionals when it comes to understanding AI and how to use it. 

To access other content from this research program, visit the Resources page of the HCM section on SAP.com. We hope you find it useful in maximizing the value of AI for HR.

entry.title: Re: Installing SAP HANA, express edition into WSL2 (Windows Subsystem for Linux)
entry.content:
Thanks for this wonderful, detailed blog @thomas_jung . I recently used the information to install HXE+XSA on Windows 11. I had to set memory to 24GB for WSL2 to install HXE. Then, I installed insserv, gcc9, libnuma and libltdl packages.

Everything is running fine.

entry.title: Re: Crystal Reports Error Vendor Code 916
entry.content: The additional table probably lacks permissions for the user context when the failure occurs.

entry.title: Re: Can I backup the S/4 Sap public edition system to an...
entry.content: @ Enrique_Carrillo, could you please check if you can open the KBA with this link? https://me.sap.com/notes/3396152

entry.title: Questions about enabling Debug logs in a Production environment
entry.content:
Hey Team,

We need to enable debugging logging on a lower environment to check application logs that will be printed in DEBUG mode. We will need the steps on how to do so along with the information on below questions:

  1. Enabling it in a Production environment, will it cause any impact on its performance?
  2. After enabling it an environment, the past DEBUG logs will be visible for us?

Thank you so much in advance!


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: Questions about enabling Debug logs in a Production e...
entry.content:
Nice to meet you, my name is Wesley from SAP Technical Support and I am here to assist you 🙂

To enable debug logs, you can refer to the KBA 3277494 How to enable debug logging on specific service from Cloud Portal where we explain how to do it for custom or OOTB services by adding below properties in Cloud Portal affected instances. It is also possible to add logging on a single class or the whole package, however ensure your custom class has debug log statements to print. you can add logging on a single class or the whole package, however ensure your custom class has debug log statements to print:

log4j2.logger.xxLogName.name = xxx.custompackage.com or classname with package
log4j2.logger.xxLogName.level = DEBUG
log4j2.logger.xxLogName.appenderRef.stdout.ref = STDOUT

For example, if you want to enable synchronization logs for the de.hybris.platform.catalog.jalo.synchronization. 

log4j2.logger.synchronization.name = de.hybris.platform.catalog.jalo.synchronization
log4j2.logger.synchronization.level = debug
log4j2.logger.synchronization.appenderRef.stdout.ref = STDOUT

Similarly, you can give your package or any particular class name.

But keep in mind that enabling debug logs will cause them to expire sooner than the expected as there will be much more logs being generated and On Production environments, it's recommended to set the Log level to WARN. This will avoid outputting unnecessary INFO and DEBUG level logs. Ensure your WARN and ERROR level logs contain sufficient information to diagnose problems. Logging too much information makes it harder to find relevant information when problems do occur. This is explained in the KBA 3440034 Commerce Cloud Logging Best Practices along with recommendations for such cases too.

Regarding the previous debug logs, they are already visible as long as they were enabled, but if you are enabling for a different package/application/service, only from now on they will be visible in OpenSearch.

Kind Regards,
Wesley
SAP Technical Support

entry.title: IAS activation email resend after expired
entry.content:
Hi Everyone,

Wanted to ask if anyone has encountered this before.  Our client when they first went live with SF received emails from IAS to activate their accounts.  However the client has reported that they have users who did not action this and the activation emails no longer work now.

The question is is there a way for the IAS admin to be able to check which users need to have the activation email resent?  Is there a report that can be ran on this for SF? Or do we need HR to inform us the list of users and resend the activation email based on that list?

entry.title: Re: Intelligent Invoice Scanning
entry.content:

Could you please advise where could we choose mass selection and deletion ?

Currently, we have to Ctrl + click on the unwanted item lines one by one to highlight and remove all at once. 

Is there a way to save us from clicking over 100 times for one invoice please?  

Many thanks for your help.

entry.content:
Dear Experts,

Hello.

I would like to know about pre-defined standard asset class.

How can I control that users cannot use standard asset classes?

I understand that it is not possible to change the pre-defined standard asset class.

I don't want users to use the standard asset classes, any suggestions?

 

Best Regards,

Nozomu

entry.title: Will there be any impact if we change the field selection key for the PR?
entry.content:
Hi All,

 

We had assigned the NBB field selection key to the NB type PR and created a new ZNB type, also using the NBB field selection key. However, we want to make the requisitioner a mandatory field only for the NB type, but since the field selection key is the same, it also affects the ZNB type.

In this situation, if we copy the NBB field selection key to create a ZNBB type and apply this to the ZNB PR, will there be any impact due to the change in the field selection key?

Before: NB (NBB), ZNB (NBB)

After: NB (NBB), ZNB (ZNBB)

I would like to hear the opinions of you experts.

 

Thanks,

Ohsung

entry.title: How to restrict authorization for contract activation in RE public cloud
entry.content:
Hi everyone!

I have a requirement for a client that wants to restrict the authority to activate contracts to the Leasing Manager only. The one who created the contract should not be able to activate the contract. I'm checking the authorization objects in the standard business role BR_RECM_SPECIALIST in Public Cloud but I can't seem to find the one for activation. Have any of you had a similar requirement to this or have an idea how to go about this? 

Thanks in advance for your help.

entry.title: Does SAP Mobile Start support Zebra laser barcode scanning from a SAPUI5 app?
entry.content:
Hi,

We use SAP Fiori Client to expose SAP Work Zone Standard on our Zebra (Android) mobile devices. These devices have a built-in laser scanner and from the SAPUI5 apps running in Work Zone we can programmatically interact with the Zebra laser scanner to read barcodes and QR codes. We use Android Intents (via a Cordova plugin) with Zebra Data Wedge software for this as per Zebra's best practice. Works perfectly. All good.

Note that Android Intent broadcast/listeners cannot be implemented in pure JavaScript and need some native Android code. Also note that Zebra do not provide public JavaScript APIs outside of their proprietary "Zebra Enterprise Browser" software, which we don't want to use unless we are forced to.

We are moving to SAP Mobile Start on our regular mobile devices (Android and iOS), and ideally would like to on our Zebra devices with laser scanners as well. SAP Mobile Start has no native plugin technology like SAP Fiori Client does to run native code. 

Does anyone know of any possible way that a SAPUI5 app running inside Work Zone Standard, deployed on SAP Mobile Start, can programmatically interact with the laser scanner on Zebra devices? We don't want to create custom native or MDK apps as we have a ton of existing SAPUI5 apps that work fine within SAP Fiori Client interacting with the Zebra laser scanner.

We are presuming we'll be forced into using Zebra Enterprise Browser to achieve this, but I am hoping someone knows another way. I have no issue with Zebra Enterprise Browser, we've used it before. But this will give our users 2 different experiences depending on which device they are holding. Our sites are a mix of Zebra and non-Zebra mobile devices and ideally we wanted to use SAP Mobile Start for everything. And using the camera on a Zebra device to scan a barcode would be totally unacceptable for obvious reasons.

Thanks,

Brendan

entry.title: Re: Scope Item 6W1 - Freight Unit Building Rule available
entry.content:
Hi,

The App name for freight unit building is "Manage Freight Unit Building Rules" and you can find details on this app in the Fiori apps library. This App is relevant for the External Transportation Planning also as the freight unit is first created in the public cloud system and then transferred to the external system for planning. 

Regards,

Saurabh Goyal

entry.title: Unlock your green supply chain with SAP Sustainability Data Exchange

📢 #sapsustainability #supplychain #sapcloud #s4hana #clouderp #sustainability #risewithsap

Join our live virtual session to learn how SAP Sustainability Data Exchange can help you streamline and simplify the process of collecting and sharing Scope 3 emissions data with your business partners based on industry standards. Discover how this innovative solution empowers your procurement and supply chain management to support your sustainability strategy and pave the way for a greener future. Don't miss this opportunity to learn about the future of sustainable business practices!

Deep Dive: We will be offering a deep dive session on February 19.
Make sure you register to attend live or get a recording:

entry.title: Re: Business Process Integration certificate

entry.title: Re: Will there be any impact if we change the field selec...
entry.content:
As long as you only using NBB for NB--and making the requisitioner field mandatory for NBB --you should be okay-- your ZNB will have a new field key ZNBB and in that field, you will not have that issue---But you run few scenarios applicable to your system --e.g. 

All NB PRs--old or new this field is mandatory now-- so any time you go and change old PR that do not have this value --you need to supply it -- so consider updating old PRs as well 

PRs generated from MRP contain MRP controller names --if you are expecting it should be userid --consider making a change in the config for MRP controller as well to reflect the same.

Your PRs are created from ME51N or you have PRs created from order or network or other source you need to make sure you supply this field or make it mandatory on that end too.

Good luck !!

entry.title: Re: Suppress Custom uibb in sap mdg Customer
entry.content:
Hi Karthik,

Please try setting the UIBB property - HIDDEN ELEMENT to "Hidden and excluded from event loop". 

Regards,
Saravanan

entry.title: Re: SAP S/4HANA_Open Sales Order migration_Migration Cockpit error

entry.title: Re: Dynamic data tiles with SAP screen Personas

entry.title: Accelerate your period-end journal entries with AI-assisted Journal Upload Cases
entry.content:
With the S/4Hana Cloud Private Edition 2023 FPS3 delivery, SAP would deliver a feature that accelerates period-end journal entries with AI aid. Period-end journal entries are necessary for a period-closing activity. Finance teams spend considerable time curating data according to policies and reporting needs. SAP Business AI for Finance offers AI-assisted Journal Upload Cases that streamline operations, automate processes, and generate period-end entries aligned with posting policies faster than ever. This empowers better business decisions and transforms your team into a lean strategic finance function.  This solution is ready to use for your specific business needs without the need for IT support. (Use of this feature may require some additional commercial agreements, please get in touch with your SAP account executive for further details.) 

This blog post explains the steps to using AI-assisted Journal Upload Cases. One example of recurring period-end tasks is creating accrual postings for shuttle bus expenses incurred by different departments. This is one example of recurring tasks that can be seamlessly performed utilizing AI-assisted Journal Upload Cases.

1. Prerequisites

AI-Assisted Journal Upload Cases require AI to be scoped in an S/4Hana Cloud Private Edition system. SAP has delivered an ISLM (Intelligent Scenario Lifecycle Management) scenario, FINS_ACDOC_AI_MJUC, which needs to be deployed and activated in a customer system.

Before activating the above scenario, you need to get AI service keys. Please follow the required SAP ticket process to get the necessary keys by creating a ticket on component CA-S4H-BTPAI. Once you have the required data (OAuth 2.0 Client Profile & Service Key (JSON format)) available, you need to update the same in the system using the below steps.

Update the service key details in the ISLM scenario via the below IMG tree:

ABAP Platform > Application Server > Basis Services > Intelligent Scenario Lifecycle Management > Service Connections for Machine Learning Infrastructure > Maintain Intelligent Scenario Connections

After updating the AI key information, the ISLM scenario must be deployed and activated in the system. This can be done using the Fiori app (App ID F4470): Intelligent Scenario Management.

 

 

1.1 Authorizations

The Fiori apps for posting policy and journal cases are added to the below artifacts:

Business Catalog: SAP_SFIN_BC_GL_JE_PROC (General Ledger—Journal Entry Processing)

Technical Catalog: SAP_TC_FIN_ACC_COMMON (SAP Financials - Accounting: Fiori Apps)

Business Group: SAP_SFIN_BCG_DOC_ENTRY (Journal Entries)

Business Role: SAP_BR_GL_ACCOUNTANT (General Ledger Accountant)

1.2 Number Ranges

Number range object: IJU_CASE

Use T-Code SNRO and maintain a number range interval for the journal case object.

2. Configuration

Two configuration activities, the Journal Case Category Code and Case Subcategory Code, enable customers to categorize their different use cases for manual journal uploads. For example, suppose you have two other policies for two instances of accruals. In that case, you will create one category code and two subcategory codes inside that these policies can be uploaded into the system and later used by journal cases. 

2.1 Journal Upload Case Category Codes

It is accessible in the following IMG tree: Financial Accounting > Financial Accounting Global Settings > Document > Intelligent Journal Uploads > Define Journal Upload Case Categories

 

2.2 Journal Upload Case Subcategory Codes

It is accessible in the following IMG tree: Financial Accounting > Financial Accounting Global Settings > Document > Intelligent Journal Uploads > Define Journal Upload Case Subcategories

 

3. Posting Policies

You can upload your posting policies in the system with the above settings. In 2023 FPS1, we are only supporting Excel format. To get a template for a posting policy, please get in touch with SAP refer to note: 3561821

A posting policy is a list of instructions for various fields on a standard journal entry header and item levels. A sample file screenshot is as follows:

The Fiori app below creates a posting policy in the system and uploads the document.

Fiori app: Manual Journal Posting Policies (App ID: F8539)

Business Role to access the app: SAP_BR_GL_ACCOUNTANT

The app would be accessible via General Ledger > Journal Entries

Select appropriate category and subcategory codes, describe your policy, and provide a “Valid From” date. Once the policy is active, it will be valid per the provided “Valid From” date. The “Valid To” date is defaulted to 31.12.9999. 

The system validates if the provided “Valid From” date is possible based on the existing active policies for that category and subcategory codes. The system will give an error if an active policy with a “Valid From” date after the provided date exists. The system will allow a “Valid From” date if no active policy with “Valid From” exists on or after that date.

Let’s understand from the illustration below.

If you try to create a new policy with the “Valid From” date 01.07.2024, the system will not allow it as another policy is valid from 15.07. However, the system will allow you to create a new policy valid from 16.07.2024.

In 2023 FPS3, the system cannot detect gaps in datelines for a policy specific to a category and subcategory code. Thus, as the “Valid From” date is a user-entry field, there might be gaps if the user does not ensure proper dates to avoid gaps.

After uploading the policy document, you can proceed with activation. The button Active in the screenshot below activates the document.

Activation is a background process that may take around 4-5 minutes. During activation, all the instructions are extracted from the uploaded policy document and sent to an AI engine to map with the system's existing capabilities. The policy is not activated if the AI engine cannot map one or more instructions. The errors are visible in the Application Log on the Fiori app. In 2023 FPS3, the Fiori app does not have a view to show the mapped capabilities. This is something that is being worked on for the next release cycle.

The supported capabilities are as follows:

  1. SplitConditon: Splitting of journal entries based on specific attributes. For example, journal entries should be split for company codes.
  2. Aggregation: Aggregation of amounts based on specific attributes. For example, the aggregate document currency amount for each cost center and vendor ID.
  3. Copy: Copy the value from an Excel field. For example, the Company ID (BUKRS) value is taken from the Company column in the transaction Excel.
  4. Assign: Assign a fixed value to an attribute. For example, the G/L account has a fixed value defined in the transaction Excel.
  5. Evaluate Condition: Evaluate a condition and then calculate the value for an attribute. For example, Post Key is 40 for positive and 50 for negative amounts.
  6. MaxLines: Set the maximum number of line items in a journal entry. For example, the posting policy may have an instruction stating that a journal entry cannot have more than five line items.
  7. Concatenate: Concatenates different parameters as specified in a posting policy.

Once the policy is active, you can proceed with case creation.

4. Journal Cases

To create a journal case, you should be ready with the data that you want to upload to that case. This data relates to the transactions you prefer to be considered for journal entry creation. There is no standard format for preparing your data except that it should be available as an Excel file.

The first row should be the header row, with the names of the fields corresponding to the data's semantics.

System Validations on data file:

  1. An error will be raised if the column names mentioned in the posting policy file are not present in Excel.
  2. If mandatory fields required to create a journal entry in the system are missing in Excel, an error will be raised.

A sample data file is illustrated below:

 

4.1 Create Journal Case

The Fiori app below creates a journal case in the system and uploads the document.

Fiori app: Manual Journal Upload Cases (App ID: F8538)

Business Role to access the app: SAP_BR_GL_ACCOUNTANT

The app would be accessible via General Ledger > Journal Entries

Describe your case, case category, subcategory codes, and your fiscal period with year and variants while you create a new case. A relevant policy is fetched based on the entered category, subcategory codes, and the last date of the fiscal period. If a policy is found, it is linked under the Guidance section.

You can then upload the Excel file containing transactions. The system will validate the data, either issue an error or accept the file. If the file is accepted, the status changes from Created to Transaction Data Uploaded.

4.2 Generate Proposal

Once the transaction data is uploaded, you can trigger journal entry proposal generation by clicking the Generate Proposal button. Proposal generation is a background process and may take some time. Once the process is over, the details will be available in the Application Log.

If the proposal generation is successful, the status changes to Proposal Generated. If errors occur during the generation process, the status changes to Proposal Generation Failed.

Error handling: If there are errors, you need to go to the Application Log to check them.

  1. If the errors are related to uploaded data, you must fix them in your Excel file. When you have fixed your data in Excel, open the relevant Journal Case and click Edit. Delete the uploaded file from the Source of Transaction Data section, and the status changes to Created. Upload the new file; the status changes to Transaction Data Uploaded. Click the Generate Proposal button again; the status changes to Proposal Generation In Process.

If the errors are related to a system configuration, you must fix them with those settings. After fixing the settings, you can trigger proposal generation again by clicking the Generate Proposal button.

4.3 Validate Proposal

After the successful proposal generation, you can proceed with proposal validation. Click the Validate Proposal button to start the validation process; the status changes to Validation In Process. Validation is a background process and may take some time. Once the process is over, the status is changed accordingly.

In case the validation is successful, the status changes to Proposal Validated. If the validation process runs into errors, the status changes to Validation Failed.

Error handling: If there are errors, you need to go to the Application Log to check them.

  1. If the errors are related to uploaded data, you must fix them in your Excel file. When you have fixed your data in Excel, open the relevant Journal Case and click on the Discard Proposal button. The status changes to Transaction Data Uploaded. Click on Edit and delete the uploaded file from the Source of Transaction Data section, and the status changes to Created. Upload the new file; the status changes to Transaction Data Uploaded. Click the Generate Proposal button again; the status changes to Proposal Generation In Process.
  2. If the errors are related to a system configuration, you must fix them with those settings. After fixing the settings, you can trigger proposal validation again by clicking the Validate Proposal button.

4.4 Posting Proposal

After the successful validation, the user can proceed with the posting by clicking the Post button. This will trigger a background process and may take some time to complete.

On successful postings, the status changes to Complete. Corresponding journal entries (JEs) are created in the relevant general ledgers. The created JE IDs are updated in the proposal line items of the journal case. 

If there is an error, the status changes to Posting Failed. The user can check the errors in the Application Log.

Error handling: If there are errors, you need to go to the Application Log to check them.

  1. If the errors are related to uploaded data, you must fix them in your Excel file. When you have fixed your data in Excel, open the relevant Journal Case and click on the Discard Proposal button. The status changes to Transaction Data Uploaded. Click on Edit and delete the uploaded file from the Source of Transaction Data section, and the status changes to Created. Upload the new file; the status changes to Transaction Data Uploaded. Click the Generate Proposal button again; the status changes to Proposal Generation In Process.

If the errors are related to a system configuration, you must fix them with those settings. After fixing the settings, you can trigger posting again by clicking the Post button.

entry.title: Re: Asset Management, Corrective Maintenance Order Type
entry.content:
Hi,

That's an older scope item.

  • 'BH1 Corrective Maintenance' was superseded with '4HH Reactive Maintenance'
  • 'BJ2 Preventive Maintenance' was superseded with '4HI Proactive Maintenance'

I would recommend referring to and using the '4HH Reactive Maintenance' test script instead of the one you are currently using.

You likely don't have the older scope item activated in your system (which is why the YBA1 order type is not available to choose)

Tim

entry.title: Re: How to Validate the Data for Field in CDS View
entry.content: Thank you very much

entry.title: Re: Issue with HANA Cloud Instance in BTP
entry.content: Thanks @Vitaliy-R for the suggestion!!

entry.title: Re: Issue with HANA Cloud Instance in BTP
entry.content: Thanks @Vitaliy-R for the suggestion!! I'll make sure to check the console next time for more details.

entry.title: How to deactivate cost center for cost element
entry.content: If a G/L account is a cost element, when I enter a posting with this account, the system will require me to enter a cost object, such as cost center. However, for some accounts like city tax, I don't want to allocate it to any cost center for cost analysis. So how can I deactivate this validation when I use this cost element account in SAP cloud?

entry.title: Re: Report on who is logged in and what client level - IBP
entry.content: Hi! Is there any update if this feature is now available as I am still not able to find the exact things with my existing access.

entry.title: Re: SAP Analytics Cloud Excel Add-in Table Default Number...
entry.content:
Hi @DBalinski ,

You can change data type decimal places by default in model. 

STEP 1. You have to click on measure and select appropriate decimal places.

In the measure you have to change data type as per your requirement here as shown in pic 7 you can change as per your requirement by default in model

Here you can change just change it will default set 

Kindly upvote if you find it useful.

Thanks.

entry.title: Re: IRPA/BPA working with tables within S/4 Web/SAPUI5
entry.content: Hello, I just saw that you have multiple post related to screen scraping/desktop automation for BPA. Just wanted to check, prior concluding the application automation have you checked if there is an available API that can be used for getting/posting the parameters using BPA?
